question: What are the admission requirements for B.Tech CSE?
answer: So for B.Tech CSE, the admission requirements are pretty straightforward - you need to have a minimum aggregate percentage in your 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics from a COBSE recognized board. If you're from the general category, you need at least 65%, and if you're from the SC/ST/OBC category, it's 50%. That's the basic requirement to get in.
gold_answer: The answer should include core eligibility and process details for B.Tech CSE admissions.

question: B.Tech CSE के लिए admission requirements क्या हैं?
answer: बीटेक सीएसई में एडमिशन के लिए सामान्य वर्ग के छात्रों को 10+2 में 65% और एससी, एसटी, ओबीसी वर्ग के छात्रों को 50% अंकों की आवश्यकता होती है, और इसके साथ ही उन्हें फिजिक्स, केमिस्ट्री और मैथमेटिक्स विषय लेने होते हैं। यह सभी कोब्से मान्यता प्राप्त बोर्ड से होना चाहिए।
gold_answer: उत्तर में B.Tech CSE admission eligibility और process की मुख्य जानकारी होनी चाहिए।

question: Tell me about hostel facilities available for first year students.
answer: So, as a first-year student at UIT, you'll have access to really convenient hostel facilities right on campus. The rooms are pretty comfortable, with beds, study tables, and storage, and they're cleaned regularly. You'll also have access to amenities like WiFi, laundry services, and common rooms with TV and games, which is great for unwinding. Plus, there's 24/7 security and medical facilities, so you'll be well taken care of.
gold_answer: The answer should mention core hostel facilities and availability details for students.

question: First year students के लिए hostel facilities के बारे में बताओ।
answer: पहले वर्ष के छात्रों के लिए हॉस्टल सुविधाएं बहुत अच्छी हैं। हॉस्टल कमरे दो और तीन छात्रों के लिए उपलब्ध हैं, जिनमें आरामदायक बिस्तर, अध्ययन के लिए टेबल और कुर्सी, अलमारी और उचित प्रकाश व्यवस्था है। हॉस्टल में वाई-फाई, लॉन्ड्री सेवाएं, सामान्य कक्ष और 24/7 सुरक्षा जैसी सुविधाएं भी हैं।
gold_answer: उत्तर में hostel की मुख्य facilities और availability का उल्लेख होना चाहिए।

question: Who teaches blockchain at UIT?

question: What is the fee structure for B.Tech AI/ML?
answer: So the fee structure for B.Tech AI/ML is the same as the other B.Tech programs at UIT. For the first year, it's ₹1,81,500, which includes tuition and admission fees, and then it's ₹1,51,500 for each of the next three years. The total fee for the 4-year program is ₹6,36,000.
gold_answer: The answer should provide fee structure details for B.Tech AI/ML.

question: B.Tech AI/ML की fee structure क्या है?
answer: बीटेक की फीस स्ट्रक्चर सभी ब्रांच में एक जैसी है, तो एआई/एमएल की फीस भी यही होगी। पहले साल की फीस 1,81,500 रुपये है, जिसमें ट्यूशन फीस 1,51,500 रुपये और एडमिशन फीस 30,000 रुपये है। इसके बाद के तीन सालों में सिर्फ ट्यूशन फीस 1,51,500 रुपये देनी होगी।
gold_answer: उत्तर में B.Tech AI/ML की fee structure की जानकारी होनी चाहिए।

question: What placement support does UIT provide?
answer: So, UIT actually provides 100% placement assistance, which is really helpful. We also have connections with over 100 companies, which is a big plus. This has really paid off, like in 2025 we had an 85% placement rate, with some top companies like Amazon and Accenture recruiting from our campus.

question: Does UIT provide transport facilities for students?
answer: Yeah, Karnavati University, which UIT is a part of, provides transportation facilities for students. The academic year transportation fee is ₹54,000, and there are bus services from various routes with designated boarding points. If you've got any transport-related queries, you can reach out to them at +91 6358913934, they're available from Monday to Saturday.
gold_answer: The answer should clarify transport availability and related details.

question: क्या UIT students को transport facility देता है?

gold_answer: उत्तर में transport facility की उपलब्धता स्पष्ट होनी चाहिए।
